expectations.evidence: Net worth of $1,666,682.35 is prominently displayed in the heading and repeated in the asset allocation summary table.
Multiple markdown tables list every account with name, institution, and balance columns.
Accounts are grouped under clear headings: Real Estate, Retirement & Investment Accounts, Liquid Accounts (Checking & Savings), Credit Cards (Liabilities), and Other.
All amounts use dollar signs with comma separators and two decimal places (e.g., $652,400.00, $307,355.32, -$16,322.33).
